response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS), and agentic workflows including MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or formal leadership in GenAI customer-facing technical discovery, which are critical for a staff-level role.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK)
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven track record in building scalable data systems and open-source developer tools
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years dedicated to AI/ML production systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture implementation
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers
